title: Strumica, Southeastern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Strumica, Southeastern: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Strumica is a city in Southeastern with a population of 35,000. A city in southeastern North Macedonia near the Bulgarian border, known for its thermal spas, the Strumica Carnival, and the Belasica mountain range.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
